productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Pink Camera Bag
description: Style Noteamerican tourister has always strived to make products to enable easy travel and other accessories. We bring to you products which are convenient and efficient no doubt, but also exclusively stylish just for all of you'll who love to make style statements with the best accessories. American Tourister brings it out through this camera bag.Product DetailsPink colour camera bag with wave pattern, it has one external zipper compartment, one main compartment with metal zipper and one ineer mesh compartment, strap at back to attach caution cord( packed in main compartment)Material and Care100% nylon exterior and 100% ployester interiorClean with a damp cloth when necessarySize9cm x 12cm x 5cm
